TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pinaski = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Pinaski. 232 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 670 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 50% niqan 337 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 50% niqan 333 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Puyuma36%, Amis4%, Paiwan3%, Bunun2%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o4%.
S.PHON: = pinaski = gaga mniq tajtuŋ pənansjaŋ ka alaŋ pinaski. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, pujuma**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
S.FORM: = Pinaski = Gaga mniq Taytung Peynansyang ka alang Pinaski. 232 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 670 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 50% niqan 337 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 50% niqan 333 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Puyuma36%, Amis4%, Paiwan3%, Bunun2%, Rukai1%, ni rahuq na o4%.
S.PHON: = pinaski = gaga mniq tajtuŋ pənansjaŋ ka alaŋ pinaski. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, pujuma**%, amis*%, paiwan*%, bunun*%, ɾukai*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%.
